title: 宝塚記念の後に・リベンジ達成！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa defeats Silence Suzuka. This time,
she keeps her feet firmly planted after her
victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While congratulating her, Silence Suzuka tells El
Condor Pasa that she has the ability to turn the
cheers of her fans into strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This puzzles El Condor Pasa, since she believes all
runners have the same ability.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She ruminates on Silence Suzuka's words and
heads toward the Japan Cup.
